overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a flooded urban waterfront. The camera follows a path through shallow flood water littered with debris, passing palm trees and modern buildings in an overcast, hazy atmosphere. A character wearing protective gear is encountered briefly along the shore.

distant bridge pillars become visible through the haze

tall palm tree trunk rising from the flood water
distant concrete bridge supports visible through the atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beside a modern glass building on a flooded urban waterfront. The camera moves forward through shallow water, leaving the building behind as distant bridge pillars emerge through the hazy overcast sky. The environment is devoid of other people, with only palm trees and debris visible in the murky water.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded waterfront promenade with concrete seawall

camera passes the character and continues along the shore

segments.scene_description: Moving along the flooded promenade, the camera approaches a lone character wearing a gas mask wading through the water. After passing them, the view opens to show a concrete seawall on the right and a distant yellow building, with palm trees lining the elevated walkway above.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the flooded shoreline, passing dense debris fields in the water. The yellow commercial building grows larger on the right, revealing a large digital billboard on its roof. Palm trees line the seawall while the distant bridge pillars fade into the hazy background.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled waterfront near yellow commercial structure

events.description: approaching the yellow building underpass entrance
passing large accumulations of trash and debris in the water

agents.ego_description: walking through dense debris field approaching the building structure

entered.detail: covered walkway entrance beneath the yellow building structure
large accumulations of garbage bags and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: Approaching the yellow building complex, the camera moves through increasingly dense debris and trash piles floating in the water. The building's underpass entrance becomes visible on the right while the large billboard looms overhead. The palm trees recede behind as the camera nears the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a flooded urban waterfront that transitions from an open, hazy promenade toward a dense commercial building complex. It begins beside a modern glass building, gliding through shallow, murky water as distant bridge pillars emerge through an overcast sky. As the camera moves along the promenade, it passes a lone character in a gas mask before the view opens to reveal a concrete seawall and a distant yellow building lined with palm trees. The scene then shifts toward the shoreline, passing through fields of floating debris as the yellow building grows larger and a massive digital billboard becomes visible on its roof. Finally, the camera pushes through increasingly dense piles of trash and wreckage, moving past the receding palm trees to approach the building's underpass entrance.
